name: Intercap Lending | San Diego Branch
description_short: Intercap Lending's San Diego branch offers comprehensive mortgage solutions including conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, and jumbo loans across California.
description_long:
Intercap Lending operates a San Diego branch located at 8954 Rio San Diego Drive, Suite 102, serving homebuyers throughout California with a focus on San Diego County and surrounding regions including Los Angeles, Orange, San Bernardino, Riverside, and Ventura counties. The branch is registered with NMLS# 1878626 and maintains a team of 12 licensed loan professionals. The company specializes in serving diverse borrower profiles including first-time homebuyers, move-up buyers, downsizers, real estate investors, and those seeking refinancing options.

The San Diego branch offers an extensive product lineup designed to accommodate various borrowing needs and financial situations. Their mortgage options include conventional loans, FHA loans for borrowers with lower credit scores or down payments, VA loans for military service members, USDA loans for rural property purchases, jumbo loans for high-value properties, adjustable-rate mortgages (ARMs), refinancing programs, 203(k) fixer-upper loans for properties requiring renovation, and reverse mortgages for senior homeowners. The company also promotes temporary buydown programs including 3-2-1 and 2-1 buydown structures to help borrowers manage initial payment obligations.

The San Diego branch distinguishes itself through a substantial team of specialized loan officers with individual NMLS certifications, enabling personalized service across different borrower segments. The branch maintains direct contact channels for each team member and provides online tools including a buydown calculator for borrowers to estimate savings. Their geographic service area spans multiple Southern California counties, positioning them to serve regional market variations. The branch actively publishes homebuyer education content, including articles on buydown strategies and promotional offerings like loan approval guarantees.

While the branch demonstrates breadth in product offerings and team depth, prospective borrowers should note that specific interest rates, approval timelines, and loan terms are not disclosed on the website. The company emphasizes contacting loan officers directly for personalized quotes, meaning rate comparison requires individual outreach. As a mortgage lender, Intercap is subject to market rate fluctuations and individual borrower qualification requirements that vary by credit profile, income verification, and property type.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Serves 11+ California counties including major Southern California markets (Los Angeles, Orange, San Diego, Riverside, Ventura, San Bernardino)
Offers 12+ loan product types including USDA, VA, FHA, conventional, jumbo, 203(k), reverse mortgages, and buydown programs
Team of 12 licensed loan officers with individual NMLS certifications and direct contact information
Specializes in multiple borrower types (first-time buyers, investors, downsizers, move-up buyers, refinancers)
Provides buydown calculators and educational content on mortgage strategies
Published homebuyer tips and promotional programs like $1,000 loan approval guarantee
Established NMLS registration (#1878626) with individual team member NMLS numbers for accountability
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or specific loan terms disclosed on website—requires direct contact for quotes
No information on approval timelines, processing fees, or closing costs
Limited transparency on credit score minimums, down payment requirements, or debt-to-income thresholds by loan type
No customer reviews, testimonials, or performance data visible on the website
Disclaimer states calculator results are estimates and not a commitment to lend, limiting usefulness for actual planning
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking guidance on FHA, VA, or USDA loan programs
Real estate investors looking for jumbo loans or investment property financing
California homeowners in multi-county regions seeking refinancing options with buydown structures
Senior homeowners exploring reverse mortgage options
diagnosis: Best for California homebuyers across multiple counties seeking diverse mortgage products with personalized service from a team of 12 licensed officers. Primary caveat: rates, terms, and approval requirements are not transparently disclosed online and require direct loan officer contact for comparison shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8954 Rio San Diego Dr #102, San Diego, CA 92108
